title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Five Elders, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Garp as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NEW WORLD - AT SEA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sunny is heading towards!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: The Reverie...I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yep! Kings from around the world are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Currently gathered at Mariejois!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone's eyes are on the Ryugu kingdom this time around, since they're attending for the first time in 200 years!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Both King Neptune and his children are there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The newspaper says that Shirahoshi received a warm welcome at the Red Port... this is a big step forward for their people!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, she finally came up to the surface? weak- hosh! Must be strong now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, it looks like your grand- father was the one who escorted them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, I see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NIGH... VIVI-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: CHWAAA AANNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've become an even more beautiful (process!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to impress some- one!? Could it be me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get out of my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vivi....!! This brings back so many memories!! I haven't seen her in such a long time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it's VIV!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It says here that she was in the socialising PLAZA. Other members of royalty and their escorts are in the article, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait... if Dressrossa is also attending...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There she is!! Viola- chan!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Geh!! Wapol's there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that acorn guy! Rebecca and Sai are there, too!! There sure are a lot of people we know attending the reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... All of these princesses that know me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ARE THEY OBSESSIVELY TALKING ABOUT ME!? ♉

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If they are, good for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Look here, Chopper!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AAAAA AAA!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's the matter, Bropper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Dwoctorne....//

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this, college's column hasn't done. It's huge. It

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow, she's still alive?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ARGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bugh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ehehe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!! Don't cut the newspaper, chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! I haven't read the other side yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now it's full of holes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? This is an article about Kaido, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...? What did big mom... do?? I can't read it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sanji-kun, Chopper, give me back those pieces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't wanna, ehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm glad they're all doing well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's visit them once we've sailed around the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right! Everyone is doing well, indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, Luffy- San. Have you tried calling them with the transgender snail again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, I forgot about that.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Heeeeey!! This is Luffy!! is anybody there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sigh... Nobody's responding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whatever. Let's just keep going!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all definitely want to keep going, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in a sea with waves that I can only describe as wano- Esque. I've never seen anything like it before. I can't help but have a bad feeling about this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As we've gotten closer, the wind has gotten stronger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the waves have been growing in size, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way these clouds are swirling... these don't seem like normal wind conditions, either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: in addition to the unusual waves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look! There's some awful weather over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should avoid that storm... shall we wait until it's over?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, what are you saying, Brook!? Let's go to wano already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy-san, why do you always try to lead our crew into obvious danger?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...but hey, brook...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is, Kinemon warned us about this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a bend... well, I'll explain it using this SNAIL when you get there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's one of Wano's barriers of entry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The country is always surrounded by terrible weather...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, the waves are rough, and the currents move very rapidly....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 69 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
